title: gentiana vandellioides subsp. yiliangensis
intro: Gentiana vandellioides subsp. yiliangensis, also known as Yiliang gentian, is a rare and endemic subspecies of the Gentiana vandellioides plant, which belongs to the Gentianaceae family and is native to Yunnan, China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of gentiopicrin and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and has been shown to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Gentiana vandellioides subsp. yiliangensis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are typically consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
